name: SAP Business ByDesign Blog
description: Blog posts and community content related to SAP Business ByDesign APIs and integrations.

posts.title: SAP Business ByDesign OData API Examples
posts.description: Comprehensive examples of SAP Business ByDesign OData API usage covering master data, sales, procurement, supply chain, and analytics scenarios including Postman collection samples.

posts.title: SAP Business ByDesign SOAP Web Services Reference
posts.description: Reference documentation for SAP Business ByDesign SOAP-based web services covering all business process areas including financials, CRM, procurement, supply chain, and HR.

posts.title: SAP Business ByDesign Help Portal
posts.description: Official SAP help documentation for SAP Business ByDesign including API guides, user guides, and integration scenarios.
